title: 'Journey to Kedarnath, a Divine Celebration': Read PM Modi’s Full Letter To Devotees As Kedarnath Dham Opens Doors
description: PM Modi welcomed devotees as the Kedarnath Temple opened, emphasizing the significance of this moment and the Chardham yatra as a celebration of faith and unity. He expressed gratitude to those involved in these developments while inviting pilgrims to enjoy a blessed journey to Kedarnath.
